Subject: Request for Email Confirmation – QAQC Audit of Unigaz Office  

Dear [Recipient's Name],  

Regarding the upcoming QAQC Audit of the Unigaz Office, conducted by BGC and AEB consultants on 31-10-2022, as per the provided Ashghal instruction, it is mandatory for you to initiate the work for this project.  

Please arrange and confirm the email for the audit.  

Thank you for your cooperation.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Position]  
[Your Contact Information]
